title: 5 for Friday
excerpt: 1. Had a blast with Simon Says Stamp at CHA. They came over to the booth with the whole gang to check out the newest collection, play with watercolors and do a little Instax make and take. Check out their…
body:
1. Had a blast with Simon Says Stamp at CHA. They came over to the booth with the whole gang to check out the newest collection, play with watercolors and do a little Instax make and take. Check out their blog post to see the photos. 2. What's funnier than a dog refusing to go into his kennel? When he actually says NO.

3. Post-it's are great reminders for little things, and this stay-at-home dad writes some pretty funny ones for his "permanent roommate" mostly about their little one. Read them and weep.

4. For those who have a Silhouette and want to take advantage of a fun discount off accessories, use the code: TANGERINE for 30% off, valid through tomorrow, Saturday, January 18.

5. And just because, a photo of our little guy on one of his many adventures.
